schema.title: Response List Users Api Users  Get
Response List Courses Api Courses  Get
Response Get Course Api Courses  Course Id  Get

post.description:
Create an assignment with optional file uploads and/or existing artifact references.

This endpoint supports both multipart/form-data (for file uploads) and can reference
existing artifacts by ID. All operations are atomic - if any step fails, everything
is rolled back.

Form fields:
- course_id: UUID of the course (required)
- title: Assignment title (required)
- description: Optional description text
- deadline: Optional deadline in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS)
- max_grade: Optional JSON object with grade structure: {"type": "points", "value": 100}
- artifact_ids: Optional JSON array of existing artifact UUIDs: ["uuid1", "uuid2"]
- files: Optional list of files to upload as new artifacts

schema.title: Response List Assignments Api Assignments  Get

post.description:
Create a submission with optional file uploads and/or existing artifact references.

This endpoint supports both multipart/form-data (for file uploads) and can reference
existing artifacts by ID. All operations are atomic - if any step fails, everything
is rolled back.

Form fields:
- assignment_id: UUID of the assignment (required)
- submitter_name: Name of the submitter (required)
- artifact_ids: Optional JSON array of existing artifact UUIDs: ["uuid1", "uuid2"]
- files: Optional list of files to upload as new artifacts

get.description: List all submissions, optionally filtered by assignment ID.

schema.title: Response List Submissions Api Submissions  Get
Response Get Submission Timeline Api Submissions  Submission Id  Timeline Get

post.description: Register a new user with password hashing
Login endpoint with proper password verification

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user's public information.

Check current and latest FAIR platform version.

Returns:
    dict: Contains 'current', 'latest', and 'outdated' fields.
          - current: Current installed version
          - latest: Latest available version from PyPI
          - outdated: Boolean indicating if current version is outdated
          If unable to fetch latest, 'latest' will match 'current' and 'outdated' will be False.

delete.description: Remove an enrollment. Only the course instructor or admin can remove enrollments.

ExecutionEventCreate.title: ExecutionEventCreate
ExecutionEventCreate.description:
Producer-to-FAIR event payload.

The producer identity is intentionally separate from FAIR's server ID and
sequence. Retries resend the same producer_event_id; FAIR assigns ordering.

ExecutionEventRead.title: ExecutionEventRead
ExecutionEventRead.description: Server-accepted event envelope returned by FAIR.
